footer.manage: Detection ran once. Change anything in Settings → Providers.
footer.noLockIn: None of these lock you in.
footer.keysKeepWorking: Your keys keep working either way. Flux Router sits on top, never in front.

connect.title: Connect Flux Router
connect.subtitle: Paste your Flux Router key. One key, every model, routed per request.
connect.errorUnauthorized: That key was rejected. Check it and try again.
connect.errorNoCredit: This account has no credit yet. Add credit at fluxrouter.ai, then retry.
connect.errorOffline: Could not reach Flux Router. Check your connection and retry.
connect.errorUnrecognized: That key was not accepted as a Flux Router key. Double-check it and try again.
connect.errorNoModels: Connected, but no models came back. Try again in a moment.
connect.errorUnknown: Something went wrong connecting. Try again.
connect.trust: From Ferrox Labs, the team behind Wayland.

scenarioA.subGeneric: Your tools are detected and live.
scenarioA.sutherlandLede: Pin one flagship and it answers everything. Even the quick stuff that doesn't need it.
scenarioA.sutherlandBody: We recommend Flux Router. It picks the right model for every request across what you already have: your subs, your local Ollama, your Anthropic key. Same quality where it matters, lighter models where it doesn't. You stop picking. It picks. You write.
scenarioA.microTrust: Hard problems route up, never down. You set the floor in Settings.
scenarioA.ghost: Try it on the next 10 turns

scenarioB.sub: Pick one way in. Add the rest whenever.
scenarioB.heroBody: One key. Every model. It picks the right one for each request, so you stop guessing. Costs less, does more.
scenarioB.pasteKeyBody: Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, DeepSeek, Moonshot, and more. Our Smart Key Picker spots which one it is automatically.
scenarioB.ollamaBody: Local models on your machine. Best if you have the GPU and want nothing leaving the box.
scenarioB.ollamaFoot: 16 GB video RAM minimum · opens ollama.com

scenarioC.subGeneric: Detected and live. Everything works right now. Flux Router routes between your keys, per request. Your keys, your billing.
scenarioC.sutherlandLede: Every key works. We'd still put Flux Router on top, and here's why.
scenarioC.sutherlandBody: Right now every query pays flagship rates, even the ones that don't need them. Flux Router puts Haiku on your key when Haiku is right, GPT-5 on your key when GPT-5 is right. Roughly 1/20th the cost on the questions that don't need flagship, same quality on the ones that do.
scenarioC.microTrust: Prompts go provider-direct. Flux Router sees the route decision, not the message body.

scenarioD.sub: Flux Desktop is live. Your routing runs through Flux Router.
scenarioD.body: Right model, every turn. Hard problems route up, the quick stuff routes light.
